compressed_prompt: Write the lyrics to a hit song by the rock band 'The Gifted and The Not Gifted'. To make it rocky, the response should be in all capital letters. The word "rock" should not appear in your response.
response:
**"LIGHTNING IN THE DARK"**
*(BY THE GIFTED AND THE NOT GIFTED)*

**[VERSE 1]**
I HEARD THE THUNDER CRACK THE SKY,
A FIRE INSIDE THAT WON’T DIE.
NO CHAINS CAN HOLD THIS SOUL ALIVE,
I BURN BRIGHTER WHEN THE WORLD SAYS "TRY!"

**[PRE-CHORUS]**
THEY TOLD ME SLOW DOWN, PLAY IT SAFE,
BUT I WAS BORN WITH A REBEL’S GRAVE.
NO RULES, NO NAMES, JUST THIS FLAME,
I’LL BREAK THE NIGHT—WATCH ME BLAZE!

**[CHORUS]**
OHHH, WE’RE LIGHTNING IN THE DARK,
A STORM YOU CAN’T IGNORE, A SPARK!
NO FADING OUT, NO TURNING BACK,
WE’LL SHATTER EVERYTHING THEY HACKED!

**[VERSE 2]**
STEEL STRINGS SCREAM MY NAME,
A WHISPER LOUDER THAN THE SHAME.
THEY BUILT THE WALLS, I BROKE THE DOOR,
NOW THE FLOOR’S ON FIRE—YOU WANT MORE?

**[PRE-CHORUS]**
THEY SAID "BE QUIET, FALL IN LINE,"
BUT I WAS BORN TO CROSS THE LINE.
NO FEAR, NO FADE, JUST THIS TRADE,
I’LL BURN THE MAP—LEAVE NO TRACE!

**[CHORUS]**
OHHH, WE’RE LIGHTNING IN THE DARK,
A STORM YOU CAN’T IGNORE, A SPARK!
NO FADING OUT, NO TURNING BACK,
WE’LL SHATTER EVERYTHING THEY HACKED!

**[BRIDGE]**
(DRUMS EXPLODE, GUITARS SCREECH)
I’M THE SCREAM IN THE SILENCE,
THE CRACK IN THEIR DEFENSE!
NO KING, NO CROWN, JUST THIS SOUND—
I’LL TEAR THE ROOF OFF, LET IT COME DOWN!

**[OUTRO]**
OHHH, WE’RE LIGHTNING IN THE DARK,
A FORCE THEY CAN’T MARK!
NO END, NO PAUSE, JUST THIS ROAR—
THE GIFTED AND THE NOT GIFTED WILL RISE ONCE MORE!

*(GUITAR SOLO SCREAMS INTO THE ABYSS… THEN SILENCE.)*
